title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 215.250 - Repayment of general revenue funds
text:
215.250.  Repayment of general revenue funds. — Any funds appropriated from general revenue for the administrative cost of operating the state housing development commission shall be reimbursed by the commission to general revenue as funds become available to the commission.
(L. 1969 H.B. 130 § 35)
